name: Ben Carson
subject: I'd like to send you this before we run out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29056423:27893238318:m:1:876315805:0C33F2D130D78D83C0636ADBC8EA7EB1:r)
---
|

Peter,

Not being a career politician I know that before the American people will consider my solutions for fixing America, they will first ask - who is Ben Carson?

To help answer that question, I've published a new, easy-to-read short book on my life, simply called _My Life_. It is based upon my best seller _Gifted Hands_.

**Before we run out, I would very much like to send you a copy to read and share with your friends and family.**
**[If you would be generous enough to make a donation of $25 or more right now, my campaign will send you a copy.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29056423:27893238318:m:1:876315805:0C33F2D130D78D83C0636ADBC8EA7EB1:r)** | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29056423:27893238318:m:1:876315805:0C33F2D130D78D83C0636ADBC8EA7EB1:r)
---
At its core, my story is an American story. Growing up on the poorest of streets in Detroit with bad grades and a horrible temper, even I gave up on myself for a time.

But the determination of a loving mother who refused to give up on me convinced me I could do anything. I have lived the American Dream.

I'm running for President because we must again be a country where every single American has the opportunity to think big, to pursue happiness, and to reach their full, God-given potential.

With the release of _My Life_ , I hope to help to share my story and show that by working together, we can restore the promise of America.

**[I hope you will support me in this effort by making a donation of $25 or more right now so you can receive your exclusive copy of _My Life_](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29056423:27893238318:m:1:876315805:0C33F2D130D78D83C0636ADBC8EA7EB1:r).**

Thank you, and God Bless America.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29056423:27893238318:m:1:876315805:0C33F2D130D78D83C0636ADBC8EA7EB1:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29056424:27893238318:m:1:876315805:0C33F2D130D78D83C0636ADBC8EA7EB1:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29056425:27893238318:m:1:876315805:0C33F2D130D78D83C0636ADBC8EA7EB1:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29056426:27893238318:m:1:876315805:0C33F2D130D78D83C0636ADBC8EA7EB1:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29056427:27893238318:m:1:876315805:0C33F2D130D78D83C0636ADBC8EA7EB1:r)
---|---|---|---

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313 | Paid for by Carson America, Inc.
---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: re: Friend, Can we talk?
body:
Friend, I wanted to make certain you saw the email I sent a few days ago. Tomorrow afternoon I am hosting a conference call [**with supporters who give $100 or more to my campaign**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29060201:27897736558:m:1:877327319:0ACF116D4546CCDEE1847AD208E95086:r), and I hope you will be able to join.

More details are below.

**I hope we will talk tomorrow -- there is definitely a lot to talk about.**

\- Lindsey

| |

---
---
|
Friend,

**ISIS attacks. Iran's nuclear program. Israel's safety. International hackers. Greece's economy. I could go on.**

The list of critical threats our country faces is constantly growing.

**I am the only candidate for president who has a clear and comprehensive plan to protect our nation. But in order to become our next Commander-in-Chief and put that plan into action, I need your immediate help.**

[**Can I count on you for a critical campaign contribution of $100 or more right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29060201:27897736558:m:1:877327319:0ACF116D4546CCDEE1847AD208E95086:r)

**After you donate $100, you will be directed to the details for a Supporter-Only conference call this Wednesday, July 15th at 4:30pm EST.** **

You see, Friend, I wish that we had an opportunity to talk more frequently, which is why our campaign has set up this Supporter-Only call.

I know summer is a busy time for everyone, but I hope we can catch up on Wednesday to discuss important topics like national security and give you an opportunity to ask me questions about my presidential campaign.

**Even though I wish we could meet in person, this format will allow supporters to call in from all over the country and will help our campaign raise the funds we need to spread my message of "Security Through Strength" to voters everywhere.**

Thank you for your support. I hope to talk with you on Wednesday.

Sincerely,

P.S. I hate asking for money; it is by far the biggest downside of running a campaign. But, as you know, we wouldn't be able to run a winning campaign without the funds needed to fuel it. [**After your donation of $100 or more, you will be directed to the details for the call**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29060201:27897736558:m:1:877327319:0ACF116D4546CCDEE1847AD208E95086:r). **If you know of friends who might want to contribute and participate in our Supporter-Only conference call, please forward this email to them. Thank you.** |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isSwnwg1aN). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osSwnwg1aN)

name: Ben & Jerry via Bernie 2016
subject: Ben & Jerry: people, Ben & Jerry's: corporation
body:
#
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hi, I'm Ben. Ben Cohen
And I'm Jerry. Jerry Greenfield |
| I'm a person. Ben Cohen
And I'm a person. Jerry Greenfield |
| And together, we came up with a company called Ben & Jerry's Homemade, Inc. Ben Cohen
That's a corporation. Jerry Greenfield |
| Ben, person. Jerry... Ben Cohen
Person. Jerry Greenfield |
| Ben & Jerry's, not a person... that's a corporation. Ben Cohen
They're different. Jerry Greenfield |
| But there's this problem. The Supreme Court decided that corporations are people, and that they're entitled to the same rights as people are. It's called "corporate personhood." Ben Cohen
That's ridiculous. And what it means is that this presidential election, there will be a whole mess of shadowy money and corporate contributions backing candidates and causes on both sides of the aisle. Jerry Greenfield |
| Except for Bernie Sanders, of course. Bernie has led the fight to put an end to the corrupting influence of big money in our politics. Ben Cohen
From the very beginning, Bernie's called for a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United -- something with which we couldn't agree more. Jerry Greenfield |
| [Sign Bernie Sanders' petition calling for a constitutional amendment to reverse the disastrous Citizens United Supreme Court decision.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2051/43f17890/5c636ae3/621d8fbc/759069315/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/citizens-united-bj?source=em150714su-bj-f") Ben Cohen
People thought we were crazy when we started putting dough into our ice cream. Jerry Greenfield |
| But what's really crazy is all the dough corporations are putting into politics. Ben Cohen
This issue is so important because all of the money it introduces into the political process influences almost every issue Congress considers. Jerry Greenfield |
| Join us and sign Bernie Sanders' campaign to overturn Citizens United. Ben Cohen
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2051/43f17890/5c636ae3/621d8fbc/759069315/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/citizens-united-bj?source=em150714su-bj-f")
* * *
Thanks for joining us in this important effort!
\- Ben Cohen & Jerry Greenfield -
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2051/43f17890/5c636ae3/621d8fbd/759069315/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em150714cu-bj-f")
Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2051/43f17890/5c636ae3/621d8fba/759069315/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2051/43f17890/5c636ae3/621d8fbb/759069315/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2051/43f17890/5c636ae3/621d8fb8/759069315/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2051/43f17890/5c636ae3/621d8fb9/759069315/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Gary Gensler, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: I used to work on Wall Street
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Americans can't afford to ignore this: | Friend --

Yesterday, Hillary said that when Wall Street executives commit criminal wrongdoing, they deserve to face criminal prosecution. Not a slap on the wrist, not a fine paid by their employers, but prosecution -- and serious consequences for those found guilty.

**[If you agree with Hillary that financial executives who break the law should be prosecuted, sign your name right now.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjMwNDQ2NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMzM3Nzk2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I understand these issues better than most: I spent 18 years at Goldman Sachs. I left that job to work in domestic finance at the Treasury Department, and after the 2008 financial crisis, President Obama asked me to be a regulator as part of the charge to reform Wall Street. We fought hard to enact smart regulations, but there's still more work to do -- and under a new president, the progress we've made could be undone.

I believe that Hillary Clinton must be the next president of the United States. She is the only candidate with the toughness, tenacity, and judgment necessary to advance Wall Street reform and ensure the long-term growth of our economy.

America can't afford another financial crisis. We've worked too hard to get back on our feet, and we need to keep moving forward.

**Sign your name right now to stand with Hillary and demand that when corporate and financial leaders commit criminal wrongdoing, they should face criminal prosecution:

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/wallstreet/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjMwNDQ2NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMzM3Nzk2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Gary

Gary Gensler
Chief Financial Officer
Hillary for America

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjMwNDQ2NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMzM3Nzk2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMwNDQ2NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMzM3Nzk2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMwNDQ2NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMzM3Nzk2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMwNDQ2NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMzM3Nzk2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjMwNDQ2NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMzM3Nzk2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMwNDQ2NjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMzM3Nzk2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Dangerous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
# [ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYwNjItN2VmZTZlNWItNWVlMi00ODZmLWExYWItZGQ3Yjk4NDI0NmYwDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0MjE2MmY0DQpodHRwczovL3d3dy5NaWtlSHVja2FiZWUuY29tP3M9M0lIRw0KdHJ1ZQ0KZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3d)
Friend,

Shame on the Obama administration for agreeing to a deal that empowers an evil Iranian regime to carry out its threat to "wipe Israel off the map" and bring "death to America." John Kerry should have long ago gotten up on his crutches, walked out of the sham talks, and gone straight to Jerusalem to stand next to Benjamin Netanyahu and declared that America will stand with Israel and the other sane governments of the Middle East instead of with the terrorist government of Iran. **As president, I will stand with Israel and keep all options on the table, including military force, to topple the terrorist Iranian regime and defeat the evil forces of radical Islam.
**
Standing strong, Mike Huckabee

---
Paid for by Huckabee for President
---
[Home](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYwNjItN2VmZTZlNWItNWVlMi00ODZmLWExYWItZGQ3Yjk4NDI0NmYwDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0MjE2MmY0DQpodHRwczovL3d3dy5taWtlaHVja2FiZWUuY29tP3M9M0lIRw0KdHJ1ZQ0KZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3d) | [Privacy Policy](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYwNjItN2VmZTZlNWItNWVlMi00ODZmLWExYWItZGQ3Yjk4NDI0NmYwDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0MjE2MmY0DQpodHRwczovL3d3dy5taWtlaHVja2FiZWUuY29tL3ByaXZhY3ktcG9saWN5P3M9M0lIRw0KdHJ1ZQ0KZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3d) | [Unsubscribe](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYwNjItN2VmZTZlNWItNWVlMi00ODZmLWExYWItZGQ3Yjk4NDI0NmYwDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0MjE2MmY0DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU%2fU3Vic2NyaXB0aW9uPWNhbXBhaWduJnM9M0lIRyZFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3M9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20NCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t)
